description: VERIFIED LIVE: 网易新闻 (NetEase News) via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. Article links use the /article/ path with the headline as link text. Navigate the tab to news.163.com (or another 163.com channel) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code: many article links — headline + url extracted correctly.

tools.name: netease_news_headlines
tools.description: Article links on the current 网易 page (news.163.com or another channel). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and url (163.com/.../article/...html). VERIFIED.
